evals.name: site-audit-and-planning
evals.prompt: Analyze the current site's SEO status and create a comprehensive 3-month plan to rank #1 for the keyword 'İsveç'te Şirket Kurma'. List specific technical fixes and content ideas.
evals.expected_output: A detailed SEO audit report and a 3-month action plan with technical and content recommendations.

evals.name: technical-optimization-execution
evals.prompt: Optimize the `index.html` file's meta tags and heading structure to improve ranking for 'İsveç vizesi'. Also, add appropriate Schema.org markup if missing.
evals.expected_output: Updated index.html with optimized meta tags, H1-H3 structure, and valid JSON-LD schema.
